recommendations.title: The Day of the Owl
recommendations.overview: Set in Sicily, this violent crime drama tells the tale of an Italian cop who heads to a small island town to look into the death of a construction supplier. Once there he is shocked by the influence the Mafia has over the people and even himself.

recommendations.title: A Genius, Two Friends, and an Idiot
recommendations.overview: Expert conman Joe Thanks teams up with half-breed Bill and naive Lucy to steal $300,000 from the Indian-hating Major Cabot. Their elaborate plan is full of disguises, double-crosses, and chases, but Joe always seems to know what he's doing.

recommendations.title: Amityville II: The Possession
recommendations.overview: Anthony and Dolores Montelli, along with their four children, move into their dream house in Amityville and are immediately plagued by a string of paranormal experiences. When the abusive Anthony wrongly places the blame on their children, Dolores re

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: The Great Train Robbery
recommendations.overview: After the train station clerk is assaulted and left bound and gagged, then the departing train and its passengers robbed, a posse goes in hot pursuit of the fleeing bandits.

recommendations.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
recommendations.overview: Two jobless Americans convince a prospector to travel to the mountains of Mexico with them in search of gold. But the hostile wilderness, local bandits, and greed all get in the way of their journey.

recommendations.title: Open Range
recommendations.overview: A former gunslinger is forced to take up arms again when he and his cattle crew are threatened by a corrupt lawman.

recommendations.title: The Yearling
recommendations.overview: Jody convinces his parents to allow him to adopt a young deer, but what will happen if the deer misbehaves?

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Organ Trail
recommendations.overview: A young Abigale Archer is left friendless and alone in a brutal Montana winter during the 1870s—fighting for survival and to retrieve her one earthly possession, her family’s horse, from a gang of bloodthirsty bandits.
